title: Create: Recipes+
description: This mod adds two QoL (Quality of Life) recipes to The Create Mod.
body:
# This is a [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) Addon that adds three QoL (Quality of Life) recipes.

First is getting **1 Netherrack** from **Heated Compacting 2 Nether Wart** and **1 Cobblestone**.

![Netherrack Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9737cb6a8255adbd0da176eeeeed06b3fa96e71e_0.webp)

Second is getting **500 mB of Honey and a 5% chance to get 1 Sand** from **Heated Mixing 1 Limestone**

![Honey Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87f69b034fdcc2345f93601a72ace258b3e08c07_0.webp)

The last one is getting **1 Tuff** from **Compacting 1 Andesite, 1 Diorite and 50 mB of Lava**

![Tuff Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/137d9bcabe8d3dec79a474eb8122f37071279118_0.webp)
